title: The Night Crawler
teaching_point: Basal insulin keeps working overnight while you fast — that's why lows can happen while you sleep.

scenes.subtitle_text: My mom checks my sugar at night and sometimes it's really low. But I didn't eat anything!
scenes.voice_text: MiraAi, my mom checks my sugar at night and sometimes it's really low. But I didn't eat anything!

scenes.subtitle_text: That's The Night Crawler. Your long-acting insulin keeps working even while you sleep.
scenes.voice_text: That's The Night Crawler. Your long-acting insulin keeps working even while you sleep. And because you're not eating...

scenes.visual_note: Overnight basal pressure — insulin active, no food input
scenes.subtitle_text: Insulin working all night, no food coming in. That's why your mom checks.
scenes.voice_text: See this? Insulin working all night, no food coming in. That's why your mom checks.

scenes.visual_note: Gatiep personifies the insulin with humour
scenes.subtitle_text: He thinks he can sneak around while I sleep.
scenes.voice_text: He thinks he can sneak around while I sleep.

scenes.visual_note: Both characters share a reassuring moment
